channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: DHS Should Target Employers of Illegal Aliens, Not Appease Them
item.description: The agency should not collaborate with businesses to sustain a system that harms American workers and national sovereignty.

item.title: Trump trade representative signals further tariffs as blanket levies end and Democrats raise cost concerns
item.description: President Trump plans to keep tariffs central to his economic policy despite legal challenges and Democratic criticism that they drive up prices.

item.title: Surrogate mother seeks custody of babies she raised after intended parents abandoned them
item.description: The commercial surrogacy industry relies on contracts that may redefine motherhood and ignore bonds formed during pregnancy, a case shows.

item.title: How woke Smithsonian bureaucrats 'killed America's story'
item.description: "The National Museum of American History is no longer the nation's museum of American history," Spalding said.
